gxio_mica_result_t Struct Reference
[MiCA Queue API (gxio/mica_queue.h)]

gxio_mica_result_t More...


Data Fields

uint64_t user_ptr
 The opaque pointer supplied with the request.
uint64_t context_status
 The 64-bit status register value.

Detailed Description

gxio_mica_result_t

The gxio_mica_result_t record is used to hold the result of a MiCA operation.

Field Documentation

uint64_t gxio_mica_result_t::user_ptr

The opaque pointer supplied with the request.

uint64_t gxio_mica_result_t::context_status

The 64-bit status register value.
